title: marat #4803
definition:
1) to bare, polish, make smooth or bald or bare
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to make bare
        1a2) to scour, polish
    1b) (Niphal) to be made bald
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to bare, polish, make smooth or bald or bare
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to make bare
        1a2) to scour, polish
    1b) (Niphal) to be made bald

    NASB:  to make smooth, bare or bald, to scour, polish
